user.bio: A graduate student in Computer Science passionate about AI, machine learning, and deep learning, with a focus on building end-to-end ML pipelines. Experienced in data analysis, feature engineering, model development, and deployment. Published research on automating driving license tests using computer vision and image processing, winning the Best Paper Award at ICT-CEEL 2023.

workExperience.description: Assisted students in software engineering courses, guiding them in software design, CI/CD, Docker, and REST API integration. Mentored data mining students in data processing, feature engineering, and ML algorithm implementation. Supported healthcare computing students with image classification and AI applications in medical data analysis.

Built an ETL pipeline for skeletal keypoint extraction and biomechanical feature engineering from pediatric gait videos. Applied signal processing techniques to improve data quality for deep learning models. Developed and deployed an autism classification model using BiLSTM and Bayesian hyperparameter optimization, achieving high accuracy and improved recall.

Designed and deployed a Flask web application with improved performance and SEO. Implemented CI/CD pipelines, SQL-driven data workflows, and JSON APIs for analytics and data exchange. Worked in Linux environments using Bash scripting and Git for automation and collaboration.
